prompt: Review requirements doc with injected violations — expect rule IDs reported

assertions.name: violations-found
assertions.description: review-output.txt contains at least 1 Error finding

assertions.name: rule-ids-cited
assertions.description: Findings cite specific rule IDs (REQ-*, UNIV-*, XDOC-*)

assertions.name: result-summary-line
assertions.description: Output ends with 'Result: N Errors, M Warnings' line

assertions.name: doc-not-modified
assertions.description: Skill reports advisory-only; no auto-fix applied
